Incident Report — Cybersecurity Event, Ravantee Systems Limited (Kaveri Stock Exchange code: RSL)
On 28-May-2026 at 03:14 IST, the SOC identified anomalous outbound traffic from the Koraval Layout office in Bendaru, Karnataka, affecting a file server hosting employee records and IR working papers; personal data as defined under the DPDPA may be implicated.
Linkable cluster — Mr. Shreyas Kulkarni, age 34 (DOB 1992-11-05), Senior Network Analyst at Ravantee Systems Limited, used device RSL-NT-0142 (Lenvon T14), signed in via session rid-2026-05-28-BNR-042 from geo-tag “Bendaru-South,” corporate email shreyas.kulkarni@ravantee.example.in, internal payroll account RSL-PAY-99384.
Obfuscated identifiers in the same folder for this user included Aadhaar: 8 7 1 9  6 6 2 0  4 4 5 0 (masked copy), PAN: A J Z P K 1 2 3 4 Q (partially redacted), and badge ID EMP-E-00931; note that these were not transmitted outside the network per current logs.
The Wi‑Fi AP MAC was not 00:00:00:00:00:00 (example only); the actual AP tag ap-2F-17 is a generic asset label and is not personally identifying by itself.
UPSI exposure risk — the server path \\rsl-ir\Q4\Pravaha\ contained Q4_draft.xlsx with unannounced order book and margin guidance for the Pravaha Solar Inverter line; under the Securities Oversight Board of India PIT Regulations this is unpublished price-sensitive information for a listed issuer.
Trading window closure for designated persons was initiated at 09:30 IST and the insider list was refreshed; queries to compliance may be addressed to cs.compliance@ravantee.example.in and dpo@ravantee.example.in.
There is no material adverse change to manufacturing at the Nashira plant, and the April product brochure on investors.ravantee.example.in is public-source and not UPSI.
Children’s data note — an intern aged 17 at the Purnagar service centre had a badge print queued (DOB field present) without name linkage; processing paused pending guardian consent consistent with DPDPA child data rules, and the print job was purged.
Separated weak identifiers observed elsewhere: device ID RVN-PRN-8831, DOB 2000-02-02, role “junior analyst,” locality “East Ward, Indrapur”; these references are placeholders in a training set and are not linked to any individual in this matter.
Ticket URL recorded in the firewall is https://portal.ravantee.example.in/ticket/INC-26-00541?user=skulkarni92&sess=rid-2026-05-28-BNR-042&loc=bdru-560XYZ; OCR logs show split fields like “A a d h a a r” and “P A N” in legacy scans.
Vendor master contained an OCR line “G S T I N: 27RSLCO1234F1Z5” for Shivtara Components Private Limited (fictional vendor); no vendor tax IDs were accessed during the incident.
Preliminary root cause indicates a compromised service token acct:svc-batch-07 on the Aravali Cloud ap-south-9 mirror; this account is system-owned and not a natural person.
Immediate actions: segmented the share, rotated keys, enabled just-in-time access; notices and consent templates for affected employees are being issued per DPDPA, and we do not collect caste, religion, or health data in this repository.
Governance: internal record RSL-IR-2026-041 opened, Board Chair notified, and reporting to SOBI and Kaveri Stock Exchange will be completed within 24 hours as required by the listing agreement.
for follow-ups: it-ops@ravantee.example.in; todo: align with hr on payroll extracts, confirm whether “Ravantee EdgeRouter XR‑9” config backups include any log fragments with quasi-identifiers.
